General Dentistry

Orthodontics

Cosmetic Dentistry

Pediatric Dentistry

Our McAllen Dentists Can Help You Get a Better Smile in Less Time

We make dentistry exciting again! You’re probably wondering, “How is that possible?” Well, we value your time, and our dentists are excited to offer state-of-the-art Cerec technology for same-day crowns with beautiful results. With dental offices in McAllen and throughout the Rio Grande Valley, Heroes Dental’s number one priority is your smile! After all, our #1 goal is to help you love your smile!

More Info

Care for Your Smile, Care for Your Health

Seeing your family dentist regularly is about more than just keeping your teeth clean. Your dental health can have a direct impact on your overall health. Some dental conditions have been linked to heart problems, and poor dental health can directly affect your confidence and self-esteem. With regular visits to Heroes Dental, you can rest assured that your teeth are in tip-top shape.

Request Your Visit

Testimonials

We really like Heroes Dental, as a family. Definitely recommend it! Laredo

Mercedes Rodriguez, sss

I have to say we are absolutely loving Hero’s Dental! Not only do they have respectful, wonderful staff, our experience today was just the best. Dr. Martinez is a golden emerald heart and soles working there. Pediatric

PK Mat

The ortho team have been awesome, everyone is very nice the Dr answers all my questions and keeps me to date on my daughter progression with her braces. Thank you Mission

Iris & Pedro Avila

Why Come to Heroes Dental?

Get Comfortable, Convenient Care

Catch Dental Problems Early

Experienced, Compassionate Staff

Save Money in the Long Term

When Should You Come See a Heroes Dentist?

One question we’re frequently asked here at Heroes is, “When should I see a dentist?” There are a few basic rules: first, you should generally see your dentist for a check-up twice per year. However, there may be other times when you should see a dentist for care. If you’re suffering from tooth pain or sensitivity, gum bleeds, bad breath, yellowing teeth, or any other dental concerns, seeing your dentist should be your top priority. By seeing your dentist right away, you can prevent the issue from developing into an even worse—and expensive—problem.

Request an Appointment for Your Smile!
